name: Python Django App
description: Scaffolds a traditional Django full-stack web application.

commands.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path {{projectName}} ; cd {{projectName}} ; python -m venv venv
commands.description: Create project directory and initialize Python virtual environment.

commands.command: if (Test-Path {{projectName}}) { cd {{projectName}} } ; .\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1 ; pip install {{flags}} ; django-admin startproject core . ; pip freeze > requirements.txt
commands.description: Activate venv, install Django natively, bootstrap the core project in the current directory, and freeze dependencies.
Generate a robust Python .gitignore, explicitly ignoring the local SQLite database.
Run initial Django database migrations to validate the setup.
